zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Crichton - 3rd Laird of Sanquar於1348年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾時，他的父親Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar23歲，母親Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar18歲。他和Christian Erskine至少有1個兒子。他去世於1412年在他的家鄉享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Crichton - 3rd Laird of Sanquar was born in 1348, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar, was 23 and his mother, Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar, was 18. He had at least 1 son with Christian Erskine. He died in 1412, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Crichton - 3rd Laird of Sanquar est né en 1348, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Christian Erskine. Il est décédé en 1412, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Crichton - 3rd Laird of Sanquar 1348 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar 23 und seine Mutter Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar 18. Er hatte mit Christian Erskine mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1412 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Crichton - 3rd Laird of Sanquar è nato il nel 1348 nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Christian Erskine. Morì nel 1412, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Crichton - 3rd Laird of Sanquarが1348年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで生まれた時，父Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquarは23歳，母Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquharは18歳であった。彼はChristian Erskineとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1412年に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Crichton - 3rd Laird of Sanquar(이)가 1348년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Christian Erskine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1412년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Crichton - 3rd Laird of Sanquar nasceu em 1348, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Christian Erskine. Ele faleceu em 1412, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Crichton - 3rd Laird of Sanquar родился в 1348 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Christian Erskine. Он умер в 1412 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Crichton - 3rd Laird of Sanquar nació en 1348, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Christian Erskine. Murió en 1412, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
